# ShopJinn — AI-Powered Shopping Guides for India

> ShopJinn is India's AI-powered tech product buying guide platform. We publish daily AI-generated buying guides covering smartphones, laptops, earbuds, smart TVs, air conditioners, smartwatches, and home appliances — with honest comparisons across Amazon India and Flipkart.

## What We Cover
- Best Smartphones in India (budget to flagship, all price ranges)
- Best Laptops in India (students, gaming, professional)
- Best Earbuds & TWS (under ₹1000 to premium ₹50000+)
- Best Smart TVs in India (32" to 65", all budgets)
- Best Air Conditioners in India (1 ton, 1.5 ton, 2 ton inverter)
- Best Smartwatches in India (AMOLED, health tracking)
- Home Appliances (refrigerators, washing machines)
- Coupons & Deals (Amazon, Flipkart, Reliance Digital)
- Tech News (latest gadget launches, price drops, India focus)

- Publisher: ShopJinn (shopjinnog@gmail.com)
- Target Market: Indian consumers
- Update Frequency: 3 new buying guides daily
